emails.subject: Paralegal Lunches
emails.body: Paralegal Lunches The paralegals and myself meet regularly for lunch to train and discuss issues. If you can make the following, we would love to have you attend: April 26 EB 37C1 (Global Counterparty is coming to train and discuss issues with us.) 11:30 to 1:00 May 10 EB 38C1 Regular Meeting 11:45 to 1:00 Cordially, Mary Cook Enron North America Corp. 1400 Smith, 38th Floor, Legal Houston, Texas 77002-7361 (713) 345-7732 (phone) (713) 646-3490 (fax) mary.cook@enron.com

emails.subject: Re: Paralegal Lunches
emails.body: Re: Paralegal Lunches Thanks for the invite. I should definitely be able to attend on the 26th, and will try to make the May 10th one (I'll be training my replacement then, so I'll have to play it by ear). Thanks! Marie Marie Heard Senior Legal Specialist Enron Broadband Services Phone: (713) 853-3907 Fax: (713) 646-8537 Marie_Heard@Enron.net Mary Cook@ECT 04/18/01 11:03 AM
